_comment: Run with: cemu-autotester autotest.json (set AUTOTESTER_ROM to your ROM).
This sequence types Asm(prgmMLUAR, which only works on OS <= 5.4 ROMs;
TI removed assembly execution in OS 5.5+. On newer ROMs use
autotest-cesium.json (requires the Cesium shell installed as an app).
Flow: picker lists SMOKE (the transferred bytecode appvar), enter runs
it, the hash checks the printed output, then exit via pause + clear.
Run tools/get_clibs.py once to fetch test/clibs (LibLoad + graphx).

1.description: Home screen after the SMOKE appvar ran
